summary: HMAC-SHA1 request signing transport wired into client.New via a one-line hook.
reason: DNS Made Easy signs every request (x-dnsme-apiKey/x-dnsme-requestDate/x-dnsme-hmac); the generator has no signing auth mode, so a signing http.RoundTripper covers all generated + novel requests. Computes the RFC1123 date once for both header and HMAC (stricter than the official SDK). Host-gated so credentials never leak on cross-host redirects.
validated_outcome: doctor + all live commands authenticate against api.dnsmadeeasy.com; signing unit tests pass (contract, all-3-headers, cross-host no-leak, no-cred passthrough).
